meaning: 阿默达巴德[印度西部城市]
examples: A city of western India on the Gulf of Cambay south of Ahmadabad.
An archaeologist, left, investigates the ancient underground temple discovered beneath a house in the heart of Ahmadabad, India.
A young girl transports plastic cans filled with water in the Khadaghoda Sector in the Little Rann of Kutch, some 160 kilometers from Ahmadabad, India, on Feb. 7.
